title: Fantastically Indulgent Norwegian Chickpeas Casserole
description: A rich and flavorful Norwegian-inspired casserole featuring miso-marinated chickpeas, dairy-free cheese, and fresh herbs, all cooked to perfection in a Dutch oven. This indulgent dish is perfect for a special occasion or a cozy night in.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together miso paste, nutritional yeast, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chickpeas to the bowl and toss to coat with the miso mixture.
Heat the olive oil in the Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped parsley and dill to the Dutch oven and cook until fragrant.
Add the miso-coated chickpeas to the Dutch oven and stir to combine.
Transfer the Dutch oven to the preheated oven and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
